tools.name: browser_navigate
tools.description: Navigate a headless browser to a URL and return the page title and status. Use this to load web pages for inspection or interaction.

url.description: The URL to navigate to. If scheme is missing, https:// is assumed.

allow_private_network.description: If true, allows navigation to localhost/private-network hosts. Disabled by default for SSRF safety.

browser_mode.description: Override backend selection. Values: auto (default), extension, cdp-inspect (alias: cdp-debugger), local (alias: playwright). Omit or use auto to let the assistant choose.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: browser_snapshot
tools.description: List interactive elements on the current page. Returns elements with unique IDs that can be used with browser_click and browser_type.

browser_mode.description: Override backend selection. Values: auto (default), extension, cdp-inspect (alias: cdp-debugger), local (alias: playwright). Omit or use auto to let the assistant choose.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: browser_screenshot
tools.description: Take a visual screenshot of the current page. Returns a JPEG image.

full_page.description: Capture the full scrollable page instead of just the viewport.

browser_mode.description: Override backend selection. Values: auto (default), extension, cdp-inspect (alias: cdp-debugger), local (alias: playwright). Omit or use auto to let the assistant choose.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: browser_close
tools.description: Close the browser page for the current conversation, or all pages if close_all_pages is true.

close_all_pages.description: If true, close all browser pages and the browser context. Default: false (close only the current conversation page).

browser_mode.description: Override backend selection. Values: auto (default), extension, cdp-inspect (alias: cdp-debugger), local (alias: playwright). Omit or use auto to let the assistant choose.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: browser_attach
tools.description: Explicitly attach the Chrome debugger to the active browser tab. Use at the start of a browser session to establish the debugging connection before navigating or interacting. On the extension path this attaches the debugger; on other backends this is a no-op that returns success.

browser_mode.description: Override backend selection. Values: auto (default), extension, cdp-inspect (alias: cdp-debugger), local (alias: playwright). Omit or use auto to let the assistant choose.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: browser_detach
tools.description: Explicitly detach the Chrome debugger from the active browser tab. Use when done with browser interaction to cleanly end the debugging session. On the extension path this detaches the debugger and clears the Chrome debugging banner; on other backends this clears stale snapshot state.

browser_mode.description: Override backend selection. Values: auto (default), extension, cdp-inspect (alias: cdp-debugger), local (alias: playwright). Omit or use auto to let the assistant choose.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: browser_click
tools.description: Click an element on the page. Always use element_id from browser_snapshot — do not fabricate CSS selectors. For native <select> elements, use browser_select_option instead. For ARIA/custom dropdowns (mat-select, role=listbox, or any dropdown whose options appear as role="option" in browser_snapshot), click to open, take a new browser_snapshot, then click the desired option by element_id. For autocomplete inputs where options don't appear in the snapshot, use browser_press_key with ArrowDown/ArrowUp + Enter.

element_id.description: The element ID from a previous browser_snapshot result (e.g. "e1").

selector.description: A CSS selector to target. Used as fallback when element_id is not available.

browser_mode.description: Override backend selection. Values: auto (default), extension, cdp-inspect (alias: cdp-debugger), local (alias: playwright). Omit or use auto to let the assistant choose.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: browser_type
tools.description: Type text into an input element. Target by element_id (from browser_snapshot) or CSS selector.

element_id.description: The element ID from a previous browser_snapshot result (e.g. "e3").

selector.description: A CSS selector to target. Used as fallback when element_id is not available.

text.description: The text to type into the element.

clear_first.description: If true (default), clear existing content before typing. Set to false to append.

press_enter.description: If true, press Enter after typing the text.

browser_mode.description: Override backend selection. Values: auto (default), extension, cdp-inspect (alias: cdp-debugger), local (alias: playwright). Omit or use auto to let the assistant choose.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: browser_press_key
tools.description: Press a keyboard key, optionally targeting a specific element. Use for Enter, Escape, Tab, arrow keys, etc. Preferred method for navigating autocomplete dropdowns and search suggestion lists: use ArrowDown/ArrowUp to move through options, then Enter to select.

element_id.description: Optional element ID from browser_snapshot to target.

browser_mode.description: Override backend selection. Values: auto (default), extension, cdp-inspect (alias: cdp-debugger), local (alias: playwright). Omit or use auto to let the assistant choose.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: browser_scroll
tools.description: Scroll the page or a specific element in a given direction. Useful for viewing content below the fold on long pages.

amount.description: The number of pixels to scroll (default: 500).

element_id.description: Optional element ID from browser_snapshot to scroll within.

selector.description: Optional CSS selector of element to scroll within.

browser_mode.description: Override backend selection. Values: auto (default), extension, cdp-inspect (alias: cdp-debugger), local (alias: playwright). Omit or use auto to let the assistant choose.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: browser_select_option
tools.description: Select an option from a native <select> element. Target by element_id (from browser_snapshot) or CSS selector. Specify the option by value, label, or index.

element_id.description: The element ID of the <select> from browser_snapshot (e.g. "e4").

selector.description: A CSS selector for the <select> element. Used as fallback when element_id is not available.

value.description: The value attribute of the <option> to select.

label.description: The visible text of the <option> to select.

index.description: The zero-based index of the <option> to select.

browser_mode.description: Override backend selection. Values: auto (default), extension, cdp-inspect (alias: cdp-debugger), local (alias: playwright). Omit or use auto to let the assistant choose.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: browser_hover
tools.description: Hover over an element on the page. Useful for revealing hover menus, tooltips, or dropdown content. Take a browser_snapshot after hovering to see newly revealed elements.

element_id.description: The element ID from a previous browser_snapshot result (e.g. "e2").

selector.description: A CSS selector to target. Used as fallback when element_id is not available.

browser_mode.description: Override backend selection. Values: auto (default), extension, cdp-inspect (alias: cdp-debugger), local (alias: playwright). Omit or use auto to let the assistant choose.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: browser_wait_for
tools.description: Wait for a condition: a CSS selector to appear, text to appear on the page, or a fixed duration in milliseconds. Provide exactly one mode.

selector.description: Wait for an element matching this CSS selector to appear.

text.description: Wait for this text to appear on the page.

timeout.description: Maximum wait time in milliseconds (default and max: 30000).

browser_mode.description: Override backend selection. Values: auto (default), extension, cdp-inspect (alias: cdp-debugger), local (alias: playwright). Omit or use auto to let the assistant choose.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: browser_extract
tools.description: Extract the text content of the current page. Optionally include links. Output is capped to prevent excessive token usage.

include_links.description: If true, include a list of links found on the page (up to 200).

browser_mode.description: Override backend selection. Values: auto (default), extension, cdp-inspect (alias: cdp-debugger), local (alias: playwright). Omit or use auto to let the assistant choose.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: browser_wait_for_download
tools.description: Wait for a file download to complete on the current page. Use after clicking a download button or link. Returns the filename and local file path.

timeout.description: Maximum wait time in milliseconds (default: 30000, max: 120000).

browser_mode.description: Override backend selection. Only auto (default) and local (alias: playwright) are supported for this tool — file downloads require the local Playwright backend. Other modes (extension, cdp-inspect) are not supported and will be rejected.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: browser_fill_credential
tools.description: Fill a stored credential into a form field without exposing the value. Target by element_id (from browser_snapshot) or CSS selector.

browser_mode.description: Override backend selection. Values: auto (default), extension, cdp-inspect (alias: cdp-debugger), local (alias: playwright). Omit or use auto to let the assistant choose.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called
